product_overview: MallPedia is a marketplace web app for browsing products, managing shopping carts, and completing purchases as a customer. It also includes seller tools for managing products and orders, plus admin tools for overseeing users, products, and transactions.
core_goals: Browse and search products without logging in
Register and sign in with email and password
Add products to a shopping cart and manage cart contents
Complete checkout and payment as a customer
Create, edit, and delete products as a seller
View and manage orders as a customer, seller, or admin
Administer users, products, and transactions from the admin area

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to register and sign in using email and password credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See account created and access the app
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated area
Navigate to /login -> Fill in invalid credentials -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Product Browsing
features.description: Lets visitors browse the home page, filter product listings, search for products, and open product details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View product list -> Open a product -> See product details
Navigate to /products -> Filter products by category -> Review the updated product list
Navigate to /search -> Search for products -> Review matching results -> Open a matching product -> See product details

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Lets signed-in customers add products to a cart and manage quantities before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to a product detail page -> Add product to cart -> Navigate to /customer/cart -> See the added item in the cart
Navigate to /customer/cart -> Remove an item -> See the cart update
Navigate to /customer/cart -> Update an item quantity -> See the cart totals recalculate

features.name: Checkout Process
features.description: Lets customers review their cart, enter shipping information, and complete payment.
user_flows: Navigate to /customer/cart -> Review cart items -> Proceed to checkout -> Navigate to /customer/checkout -> Enter shipping information -> Complete payment via Midtrans -> See purchase completion
Navigate to /customer/checkout -> Review cart items -> Enter shipping information -> Complete payment via Midtrans -> See order confirmed

features.name: Seller Product Management
features.description: Lets sellers view their own products and create, edit, or delete products.
user_flows: Navigate to /seller/products -> View own product list -> Open create flow -> Fill in product details and image -> Submit product form -> See the new product in the list
Navigate to /seller/products -> Open edit flow for a product -> Update product details -> Submit changes -> See the updated product in the list
Navigate to /seller/products -> Choose a product to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See the product removed from the list

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Lets customers view order history and order details, and lets sellers or admins manage orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /customer/orders -> View order history -> Open an order -> See order details
Navigate to /seller/orders -> View incoming orders -> Review order information
Navigate to /admin/transactions -> View transactions and order records -> Review transaction details

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Lets admins monitor the platform and manage users, products, and transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> View admin summary -> Open user, product, or transaction management areas -> Review and manage records
Navigate to /admin/users -> Review users -> Manage user accounts
Navigate to /admin/products -> Review products -> Manage product listings
Navigate to /admin/transactions -> Review transactions -> Manage transaction records

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and register with email/password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Product Browsing
user_interactions: View product list on home page
Click on product to view details

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Add products to cart and manage cart
user_interactions: Add product to cart from product detail page

features.name: Seller Product Management
user_interactions: Create new product with details and image
